title: STV International Zero In Clothes Moth Killer Strips, 2 x 10 Strips (Scent-Free) with Zero In Moth Balls – Pack of 10 (Kills Moths, Larvae and Eggs, Odour-Free)
features: Effective clothes moth killers: one strip of detachable sheets treats an area of 1 cubic metres, protecting woollens such as cashmere, furs, silks and natural fibres in household cupboards, wardrobes, airing cupboards and drawers
Long-lasting protection: provides up to 6 months protection from damage caused by clothing moths at all stages of their life, including larvae and eggs
Moth repellent strips are fragrance-, odour- and smell-free: they are dry and do not drip or stain clothes so are suitable for use wherever clothes are stored
Pack of 10 individually wrapped moth balls: value-added multi-pack allows for multiple coverage throughout the home, wherever clothes are stored and at risk from clothes moths
Stop damage from clothes moths: Moth balls protect all precious fabrics, including woollens, silks, cottons and furs, from damage caused by clothes moths, larvae and eggs in the home.
Smells of fresh linen: No unpleasant fragrances or odours, no fumes or stains
description: From the manufacturer TARGETS HOUSEHOLD PESTS Zero In brings you a comprehensive range of pest control solutions for household pests, including flies, wasps, mosquitoes, bed bugs, fleas, clothes moths and more. Everything you need to live pest-free Professional-quality products you can trust Experts in pest control for over 25 years Zero In Clothes Moth Killer Strips – 20 Pack Total, long-lasting control of clothes moths. Protect clothes in wardrobes and cupboards with Zero In Clothes Moth Killer Strips. The easy-to-use tear-off strips kill clothes moths at all life stages to protect delicate woollens and fabrics in storage. Once activated, the strips provide up to 6 months protection without drips or stains. Contains Transfluthrin. Protect clothes in storage from clothes moth damage. Ideal for cupboards and drawers. No drips or stains. Lasts up to 6 months. Contains transluthrin. Product Highlights 6-Month Protection Protect clothes from clothes moth damage for up to 6 months in drawers and cupboards. Total Population Control Kills clothes moths, their larvae and eggs for total reduction of the clothes moth population. Dry Treatment Patterned strips do not drip or stain and can be placed in between folded clothes without causing damage to fabrics. All-Round Protection Zero In brings you a wide range of moth control solutions including pheromone traps, diffusers, aerosols, natural repellents and more - everything you need for complete protection against clothes moths. Product Highlights Long-lasting Treatment Effective control of clothes moths for up to 3 months with no fumes, unpleasant smells or staining. Total Population Control Kills clothes moths, their larvae and eggs for long lasting protection of stored clothing and fabrics. Protects Clothes in Storage Suitable for treating wardrobes, cupboards and drawers to protect delicate woollens and fabrics from clothes moth damage. All-round Protection Zero In brings you a wide range of moth control solutions including pheromone traps, diffusers, aerosols, natural repellents and more - everything you need for complete protection against clothes moths. Understanding Clothes Moths Signs of Clothes Moths Unfortunately the first sure sign of a clothes moth infestation will be damage to natural clothing and fabrics. Particularly if the items affected have been kept in storage.Look out for: Causes of Clothes Moth Clothes moths are attracted to animal hair (wool, cashmere, fur) which provides a rich source of food for their larvae. Dirty/used clothes are usually to blame for initial infestations as moths are drawn to sweat and body oil.Be extra careful when introducing vintage clothing to wardrobes and drawers and ideally wash/dry clean before storing. Treatment & Prevention Larvae cause the damage so it's important to break the cycle. Wash clothing before storage and place Zero In moth repellent products within wardrobes and drawers. Apply Zero In solutions and sprays to the inside of wardrobes and furniture prior to storing fabrics inside and monitor for infestations with pheromone traps.Always read on-pack instructions before use.
